root_cause: ExecutionAgent validated the original proposal before deterministic risk conditions changed hash-participating proposal fields; the conditioned proposal was not re-bound to the RiskDecision hash or revalidated.
invariant: A trade may only be executed when the RiskDecision hash matches the exact effective TradeProposal that will be filled.
fix_summary: After applying conditions, restamp RiskDecision.proposal_hash to the effective proposal hash when changed and rerun ExecutionGate.validate before constructing Trade/Fill.
edge_cases: 50 percent conditioned size reduction restamps hash and validates twice
99 percent reduction clamps to one share and validates twice
unknown no-op condition keeps original hash and validates once
duplicate reduction conditions produce one final effective hash validation

commands.result: Success: no issues found in 35 source files
